trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 65.2 in the healthy bullish momentum zone — not overbought — and MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram; Intel is also a beneficiary of renewed semiconductor tailwinds in a risk-on tape.
Score 95, RSI 61.6 in bullish momentum zone, MACD bullish — fintech names outperform in risk-on environments and SOFI has room to run before hitting overbought territory.
Score 95 with RSI 66.0 and MACD fully aligned bullish; small-cap communication tech, so sizing conservatively, but technical setup is among the cleanest on the screener.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1.3% and the S&P up 0.8%, a constructive backdrop for deploying idle cash. I'm filling three of the four open position slots with the top-scored names that haven't yet hit overbought RSI — INTC, SOFI, and ONDS all sit in the 61–66 RSI range with confirmed MACD bullish crossovers, offering better risk/reward than the many score-70 names already showing RSI above 80. Holding one slot and the remaining cash as a buffer against any quick reversal.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly on May 26, 2026, with technology leading as the NASDAQ surged 1.3% and the S&P 500 gained 0.8%, reflecting renewed investor appetite for risk assets. The move was driven by continued optimism around AI infrastructure spending and easing macro concerns, pushing semiconductors and growth stocks higher across the board. Breadth was strong, with most sectors advancing, suggesting institutional money rotating back into equities rather than defensive positioning.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年5月26日，美股全面上漲，科技股領漲，那斯達克指數大漲1.3%，標普500指數上揚0.8%，顯示投資者對風險資產的偏好明顯回升。市場上漲主要受人工智能基礎建設支出持續強勁以及宏觀面憂慮消退所推動，半導體及成長股普遍走高。市場廣度表現強勁，大多數板塊齊升，反映機構資金正重新流入股市，而非轉向防禦性部署。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast a stock is moving up or down on a scale of 0–100. Traders often prefer buying stocks with RSI between 55–70 — the 'bullish momentum zone' — because they show genuine upward momentum without being overbought (above 70), where a pullback becomes more likely. Today's top buys (INTC, SOFI, ONDS) were all selected partly because their RSIs sat in this healthy zone rather than the crowded overbought names.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）衡量股票上漲或下跌速度，數值介於0至100之間。交易員通常偏好買入RSI在55至70之間的股票，即所謂「看多動能區間」，因為這類股票具備真實的上漲動能，但尚未進入超買區間（70以上）——超買往往預示回調風險上升。今日買入的INTC、SOFI及ONDS，正是因為RSI均處於這一健康區間，而非擠入眾多RSI已超過80的超買個股。
